subcodes.first_line: O companion and consort of the martyr! That embodied spirit and manifest light chose thee from among the handmaidens of the All-Merciful, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قرین و ضجیع شهید آن روح مجسم و نور مصور ترا از بین اماء رحمن اختیار کرد تا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death
